problem_text_cn: 1425 天然放射性系铀系从$^{238}\text{U}$（半衰期$T_{1/2} = 4.468 \times 10^9$年）开始，经一系列$\alpha$和$\beta$衰变到稳定核$^{206}\text{Pb}$。现测得铀矿中$\frac{N(^{238}\text{U})}{N(^{206}\text{Pb})} = 2.785$，推算地球的年龄。（子核中$^{234}\text{U}$半衰期最长，$T_{1/2} = 2.45 \times 10^5$年）
problem_text_en: 1425 The natural radioactive uranium series starts with $^{238}\text{U}$ ($T_{1/2} = 4.468 \times 10^9$ years) and decays via $\alpha$ and $\beta$ emissions to stable $^{206}\text{Pb}$. The ratio $\frac{N(^{238}\text{U})}{N(^{206}\text{Pb})} = 2.785$ in uranium ore. Estimate the age of the Earth. (The longest-lived daughter nucleus is $^{234}\text{U}$ with $T_{1/2} = 2.45 \times 10^5$ years)
problem_solution_cn: 【核心思路】铀系达到久期平衡后，稳定核$^{206}\text{Pb}$的数目$N_D(t) = N_P(t)(e^{\lambda t} - 1)$，其中$\lambda = \ln2/T_{1/2}(^{238}\text{U})$。代入$N_D/N_P = 1/2.785$，解得$t = \frac{1}{\lambda}\ln(1 + 1/2.785)$。
problem_solution_en: 【Core Idea】After secular equilibrium, stable nucleus $^{206}\text{Pb}$ count $N_D(t) = N_P(t)(e^{\lambda t} - 1)$, where $\lambda = \ln2/T_{1/2}(^{238}\text{U})$. Substitute $N_D/N_P = 1/2.785$, solve for $t = \frac{1}{\lambda}\ln(1 + 1/2.785)$.
